title: Single Item Response Envelope
description: The canonical HTTP response shape for endpoints returning a single item (show, create, update). Delete endpoints return 204 No Content and do NOT use this envelope.
$comment: JSON Schema draft 2020-12. Seam 3 (Data). Producer: every HTTP surface. Consumer: every HTTP client. The 'data' shape varies per endpoint and is documented in the endpoint's OpenAPI operation. The 'message' field is present on mutations (create/update) and used for toast notifications; it is absent on reads (show) to keep read responses cache-friendly.

data.description: The item returned by the endpoint. Shape varies per endpoint.

message.description: Optional user-facing status message. Present on mutation responses (POST / PATCH / PUT); rendered in the frontend as a toast. Absent on read responses (GET show).
message.$comment: Never used for read responses — reads must be cache-friendly. See docs/service-boundary.md §Seam 3 for the envelope contract.
